snapshot.scope: Independent Planning review binds the Reader inline-reference API, data/index, service-ownership, Knowledge and interaction owners, trace projections, and exact four-commit 23-path implementation candidate at d3af5b2 based on origin/main 2932f33.

reviewers.task: Reader inline-reference contract, ownership, trace and status-impact review
reviewers.independence: Product Planning did not author the frozen four-commit implementation candidate and independently compared its exact 23-path delta, executable schemas, service/renderer boundaries, owner contracts, trace evidence, and unchanged delivery statuses before binding this snapshot.

dimensions.summary: Existing API, Technical, Data, Local Database, Knowledge and Reader owners carry the query, stable-target, rebuildable-index and interaction facts without a new owner document or path-bearing renderer surface.

Owners and exact bytes agree on activeVaultId/currentPageId/renderContextId/href/requestId input, stable page/source targets, body-free terminal outcomes, no event, target.pageId-only navigation, and sender/page/index/watcher fences.
New exact selectors project schema, IPC, index, page/source resolution, stale fences and UI activation evidence while Requirement, Exit and Phase statuses and capability assignments remain unchanged.

Focused regressions identify strict DTOs, sender lifecycle, render-context invalidation, source ownership, index revision/watch freshness, ambiguity, delayed-result rejection and stable Reader opening.
No new design document or phase narrative was introduced; one concise decision anchor, existing subject owners, exact evidence entries and this bounded recipe carry the complete semantic delta.

verification.command: Independent exact-byte and owner-contract review of d3af5b2 based on origin/main 2932f33
verification.evidence: The 23 candidate paths contain the strict shared DTO, Main/Notes/Local Database ownership, preload adapter, renderer activation and focused tests described by the synchronized owners; no durable body, arbitrary path, event channel or unrelated product surface is introduced.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions
verification.evidence: Links, whitespace, document map, PRD structure and the decision ledger pass with one machine-anchored Reader resolver decision and no new design file.

verification.command: npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: Exact Reader evidence selectors, semantic locks and strict schema/preload/Main/renderer contracts pass without changing Requirement, Exit or Phase status.

verification.command: npm run verify:independent-documentation-review && npm run verify:documentation-leanness
verification.evidence: The current recipe binds all governed roots and every changed implementation path, and leanness rejects no duplicate owner structure, stale alias or unbounded projection.

coordination.compatibility: The candidate adds one strict request/response IPC query, temporary render contexts, and rebuildable app-schema-v3/index-revision-5 reference keys; durable Markdown/Source Record ownership, backup, release scope, Requirement, Exit and Phase status remain unchanged.
coordination.acknowledgement: Product Planning synchronized the existing API/data/service/Knowledge/Reader owners, decision anchor and exact evidence projections; this review binds current bytes without promoting delivery status or claiming remaining source metadata, edit/reveal, scale or packaged-platform work.

nonBlockingRisks: Render contexts are intentionally process-memory only; restart or sender destruction requires a fresh render and never recovers prior link authority.
A dirty or unavailable inline-reference index fails closed until a verified rebuild generation is current; this query does not invent a fallback filesystem scan in renderer.
Source metadata presentation, source reveal/open, editing and selection remain unavailable even though a verified source reference can open its stable knowledge page.

Incremental watcher-at-scale proof, Windows qualification, complete assistive-technology coverage, long-page Reader budgets and signed packaged visual acceptance remain open; no Requirement, Exit or Phase status is promoted.
